title: The Snake & The File
content:
A Snake, in a fix, tried a File
    For a dinner. "'Tis not worth your while,"
    Said the steel, "don't mistake;
    I'm accustomed to take,
    To give's not the way of a File."

    We May Meet Our Match
meaning:
Walter Crane's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Snake & The File"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
